title: A 407-million-year-old plant fossil reveals a hidden fungus inside
description: A 407-million-year-old plant fossil from northeast Scotland reveals a hidden partnership with a new species of fungus .

description: How AyurScience Targets the Root Cause of Skin Health AyurScience is an Australian skincare brand founded by pharmacists who are second-generation custodians of Ayurvedic practice. This heritage is not a retrospective inspiration but a lived experience passed through generations, where plant-based remedies and rituals centred on balance formed the foundation of daily life.
